note: Contract-keyed deep capture (058-AT-SPEC). One-time build-time fetch; CI never refetches (offline determinism) — ongoing freshness is the watcher's job via the surface registry. Tier-2 conventions per 052-AT-SPEC: replace-in-place, lineage recorded (snapshot-updated in specs/lineage/log.jsonl), the extractor reads and never writes here. DEVIATION from the mcp-config capture: plugin-manifest has NO machine-readable upstream schema and NO upstream spec versioning — the code.claude.com plugins-reference page is the spec (prose + JSON examples + field tables) and the sample manifests from anthropics/claude-plugins-official are real-world corroboration (authority precedence per 050-AT-SPEC: the reference page is the spec; samples corroborate). spec_version is therefore the capture date, not an upstream-declared revision. RE-VENDORED 2026-07-23 from the captured tier-2 snapshot specs/_vendor/plugins-reference/snapshot.md (capture record archive/raw/plugins-reference/20260703T100524Z.meta.json), advancing a baseline that had been frozen at the 2026-06-12 build-time fetch. The re-vendor was gated on --check-fresh reporting ZERO semantic findings against this exact capture, so the derived projection is unchanged except for the spec_version stamp; this is a baseline advance, not a contract change. Samples and the supporting doc are deliberately NOT re-vendored — being commit-pinned ground truth that corroborates the reference page is their whole value.

files.version_basis: The page carries no version identifier and upstream publishes no machine-readable schema for plugin.json; this .md form is the same URL/form the registry's fetch_plugins_reference extractor monitors (capture.urls + ext .md in specs/upstream-surface-registry.v1.json).

files.selection_basis: Fullest metadata manifest in the official repo: name + version + description + author{name,email} + homepage + repository + license + keywords.
No author at all (proves author is optional in real catalog entries); version + keywords present.
author object with name only (no email/url); no version — exercises the minimal author shape.
homepage without repository; author{name,email} with a personal (non-org) author.
author{name,url} (covers the url sub-field) + homepage + keywords, no version — completes author sub-field coverage across the sample set.

samples_note: github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official is listed under unmonitored_candidates in specs/upstream-surface-registry.v1.json (not a registered surface); these vendor-meta entries are the samples' provenance records until a sampleable surface is registered per 050-AT-SPEC change discipline. All 5 samples were commit-pinned to the repo HEAD at fetch time. Ground-truth negative observed across the full catalog at that commit: NO official manifest uses any component-path field (skills/commands/agents/hooks/mcpServers/...) — components are auto-discovered from default locations.
